description: Create a complex VTS operator training scenario in Bridge Command's Solent environment by establishing a scenario directory at '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/n) Solent VTS Traffic Density/' containing 'environment.ini', 'ownship.ini', and 'othership.ini'. Configure the environment for daytime (08:00-14:00) in the Solent with good visibility (>= 8.0 nm) and calm weather (<= 3.0). Set the ownship as 'VTS Patrol Launch' near Calshot Spit (approx 50.82 N, 1.31 W) at a speed <= 5 kts. Populate the scenario with exactly 8 commercial traffic vessels: 1 Container ship (inbound), 1 Cruise liner (outbound), 1 Product tanker (Fawley approach), 1 Car ferry (crossing Southampton Water), 1 IoW ferry (crossing Solent), 1 Bulk carrier (outbound), 1 Naval warship (transiting), and 1 Harbour tug. Each vessel must have realistic speeds (3-20 kts), at least 2 waypoint legs, start within Solent bounds (Lat 50.65-50.90 N, Long 1.00-1.55 W), and not overlap. Generate a VTS watch handover log at '/home/ga/Documents/vts_watch_handover_log.txt' summarizing the traffic situation, specifying VHF channel 12/14, identifying deep-draft vessels, and noting crossing traffic conflicts.
